title: BrickThrowerX
description: A simple pluigin to throw bricks on right click.
body:
BrickThrowerX is a simple plugin that allows you to throw bricks and have fun with your friends

## Installation
- Just place the jar file in the plugins folder and restart the server.
- You can already start throwing bricks with other players or mobs.

## Features
- Customizable damage, speed, and time of disappearance of bricks bricks bricks
- Ability to allow to throw only bricks with special nbt tag
- You can allow players to throw not only bricks, but also any blocks/objects you want to enable.
